title: Worldly
description: Worldly adds a collection of configurable Minecraft world types, from classic Skyblock and OneBlock to Chunklock, Backrooms, Random Drops, Mountaineering, Fishing Border, and more.
body:
# 🌍 Worldly

**Worldly** is a Fabric world-type mod that turns Minecraft world creation into a playground of **challenge worlds**, **strange survival starts**, **custom terrain presets**, and **chaotic game modes**. Pick a world type, customize supported settings, and start a fresh adventure with a totally different twist. ✨

**Made by Qyutos**  
**YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@qyutos

## 🎮 World Types

### 🌳 Skyblock
Start on a classic **L-shaped Skyblock island** with minimal resources.

### 🧱 OneBlock
Break one block forever, progress through **vanilla-inspired phases**, and build your world from nothing.

### 🪙 Chunklocked
Start inside a locked area, earn tokens, complete quests, and unlock the world **chunk by chunk**. Press **R** for quests, border color, and progression info.

### 🎣 Fishing Border
Begin on a tiny ocean island and expand your border through **successful fishing**.

### 🏝️ Deserted Island
Spawn on a small survival island surrounded by ocean.

### 🟨 Eerie Backrooms
Explore procedural **Backrooms-style hallways, rooms, stairs, and unsettling spaces**. Built to pair well with horror mods.

### 🎲 Random Drops
Every drop is randomized for chaotic survival.

### 🚫 Can’t Touch Color
Avoid a forbidden color or die. Choose a color, pick random, or let it change over time.

### ⛰️ Mountaineering
Generate huge mountain-focused worlds with **high-elevation biomes** and dramatic terrain.

### 🧩 Chunk Biomes
World generation shifts biome by biome in **chunk-sized sections**.

### 🏘️ Plots
Flat plot worlds with clean pathways for building.

### 🏃 Speedrun to Object
Race to find a random obtainable item. Supports solo, multiplayer race, and manhunt-style ideas.

### 🌓 Day/Night Control
Customize world time rules, including **always day**, **always night**, or custom day/night pacing.

### 🕹️ 2D Survival Experimental
An experimental side-scrolling-style survival world type. Still being worked on and likely to change.

## ✨ Features

- 🧭 **Modern world-type selector**
- ⚙️ **Customization menus** for supported modes
- 🪙 **Token and progression systems**
- 📚 **Chunklocked quests and progression UI**
- 🌊 **Ocean survival starts**
- 🏔️ **Custom terrain presets**
- 🕯️ **Horror-mod-friendly Backrooms world**
- 🎯 **Speedrun and challenge modes**
- 🔥 **Built for Fabric**

## 📦 Requirements

- 🧵 **Fabric Loader**
- 🧰 **Fabric API**
- 🎮 **Minecraft 26.1.x**

## ⚠️ Notes

**Worldly is in beta.** Some modes are polished, while others are experimental and still evolving. Expect bugs, balance changes, visual polish, and more world types over time. **Feedback and bug reports are very welcome.** 🌟

[Enter suggestions, bugs, Or anything in between.](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeanCio8LfjEKOvvAb3M1dUZfG8ZmZuttvIhM_6LNWPS0zvOQ/viewform?usp=publish-editor)
